channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Enshrouded's New 'Forging The Path' Update Brings Custom Map Sharing, Combat Changes And More On Path To 1.0
item.content:encoded:
As the Enshrouded team works towards a 1.0 release this year, the fantasy survival RPG gets its eighth big update. Titled “Forging The Path,” this patch focuses on building up the foundations for the full release, including combat reworks, Adventure sharing, a progression overhaul and more. 

The long-awaited Aventure Sharing feature arrives with this update, allowing players to officially share and download others’ custom map creations by navigating to the feature through the main menu. While there are some limitations for now, the team says they’ll be lifting those as things develop. 

For those who are curious about starting Enshrouded up now with 1.0 in the horizon, they’ve done some upgrades to the early game experience. Not only are there better visuals in these areas, but the map and tutorials have also been tidied up to give more of a ramp-up into learning new gameplay elements. 

A ton of practical gameplay changes have been made to make things more exciting. All weapons, and even axes for mining and woodchopping, will now receive special abilities that are tapped into through a “focus” bar. Melee weapons will have their own new heavy attacks activated by holding the attack button, and mages are getting mild buffs, with heavier changes coming for the 1.0 release. 

Enshrouded’s progression and skill systems also see a huge overhaul in Update 8. Namely, in order to add easier progression towards higher-tier skills, there’ll be weaker but cheaper versions of the skills that can be leveled up to count towards the skill tree progression. Some gear will also allow their own skill progressions through upgrades. In preparation for this, all skill points have been refunded to players. 

Some other quality-of-life changes have been added, too, including an item that quick-sorts everything in your boxes, a walk toggle, generally upgradeable armor all-around and more. The changelog is up on Enshrouded’s Steam page. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/enshroudeds-new-forging-the-path-update-brings-custom-map-sharing-combat-changes-and-more-on-path-to-10-2000137867
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Palia Celebrates 10 Million Players in New Event and Announces Royal Highlands Expansion (With Mounts!)
item.content:encoded:
Palia is celebrating 10 million players, and announcing a brand new expansion coming in May that will add mounts, a new villager, and more.

To celebrate hitting 10 million players, Palia has an event on right now, offering daily quests that give a chance at two free premium mystery outfits. The team is also discounting Founder's Packs and starter packs in the shop. The 10 Million Celebration reward track, has a ton of rewards to claim, including Kilima Coin, outfits, Palcat Plush, recipes, Hugging Chapaas, nameplates, and more.

This event runs through May 11th.

The Royal Highlands expansion arrives on May 12th, and will add horses to Palia, which will be the first-ever mounts. You'll get to take care of and raise your horse on your ranch. There will be new minerals, fish, insects, creatures, and more to discover. A new villager, Echelon, is coming. We’ll learn secrets of the Amber Echo, and have a whole big new area to explore. This expansion will add the largest adventure zone in the game so far.

You’ll get to explore the Royal Highlands and make some discoveries like these and ones the team hasn’t revealed yet. There's a new video covering the  expansion content to give a taste of what is on the way.

After this expansion goes live, we’ll be getting lots more. While there are just a few hints, Sunkissed Summer is coming, with these new seasonal updates set to release new content, expanded progression opportunities, and a few extras tied to the Year of the Riffroc. “Let’s just say… your Ranch may be getting a little more lively,” the announcement blog says. With horses now confirmed to be on the way, time to start speculating.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/palia-celebrates-10-million-players-in-new-event-and-announces-royal-highlands-expansion-with-mounts-2000137869
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: New Expanded Dead By Daylight x Attack on Titan Collaboration Coming Next Week
item.content:encoded:
Dead By Daylight is no stranger to collaborations, but the latest expands the Attack on Titan collection with a return of the chaos of the 2v8 game mode returning to the Fog.

Attack on Titan has been a fan-favorite collaboration since its debut in 2022. Behaviour Interactive has heard all of the feedback about wanting an expanded collection with more characters, more themes, outfits, and more. So here we go. 

From April 28th-May 19th, the event is back, and with it, the 2v8 Attack on Titan lobby.

As for those characters and outfits, The Trapper gets the Attack Titan Legendary Outfit, so this is going to be a rather towering presence to contend with. New rare survivor outfits include Jake Park as Cleaning Levi, Yui Kimura with Mikasa’s Dark Uniform, and Sasha’s Uniform for Thalita Lyra. Renato Lyra, Adam Francis, Mikaela Reid, and Haddie Kaur also all get the Queen’s Ball Attire Outfit. The Heart of Freedom Outfit will be available for Feng Min and Meg Thomas.

There are lots of things that remain the same, as well as some changes. The round will kick off with two killers with two V8 specific Buffs and nerfs.The Deathslinger gets buffed to improve his performance, while the Oni has a nerf to make him just a little less dominant. The Cage system also gets a few tweaks to help encourage more teamwork and to keep the match pacing.

This time around, the 2v8 map rotation also grows, with Temple of Purgation and Ironworks of Misery adjusted to the mode. 

Naturally, there are also some all-new Attack on Titan rewards. Complete some quests and unlock new loot, including an Attack on Titan badge, a banner, and a new charm.

So, if you’ve been hoping this collaboration would return, you’re in luck. Now to prepare for the chaos.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/new-expanded-dead-by-daylight-x-attack-on-titan-collaboration-coming-next-week-2000137868
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
